name: FIFA World Cup 2030 — Outlook
assumptions: Format assumed identical to 2026 (12 groups of 4, best 8 thirds, round of 32) — FIFA has not formally published the 2030 format
Slot allocation assumed = 2026 baseline (UEFA 16, CAF 9, AFC 8, CONMEBOL 6, CONCACAF 6, OFC 1, 2 inter-confederation playoff slots); FIFA explicitly has not announced 2030 quotas
Host berths assumed deducted from their confederations' quotas (UEFA -2, CAF -1, CONMEBOL -3) — unannounced

Qualification simulated with a GENERIC seeded-groups model (real 2030 formats mostly unannounced); it approximates strength-ordered qualification with realistic upset rates, not any confederation's actual path
Inter-confederation playoff: 6 candidates (best non-qualifier of CAF, AFC, CONCACAF, OFC, plus two from CONMEBOL as host-confederation analog) in the 2026 two-round bracket for 2 slots
Final draw assumed to follow the 2026 template: 4 pots of 12 by strength (Elo proxies the FIFA ranking), all six hosts in Pot 1, max 1 team per confederation per group except UEFA max 2
Ratings are TODAY'S Elo — no aging, transfers or generational change is modeled; this is a current-strength outlook, not a 2030 prediction
